---
title: "People"
---

This page lists selected people with past or present formal roles in the lab and/or visible contributions to the lab's methods and infrastructure.

## Core members

- **Philip Leifeld** --- PI --- Professor of Social Statistics, [University of Manchester](https://research.manchester.ac.uk/en/persons/philip-leifeld/)  
  Statistical inference and methods for dynamic networks and text; research software.  
  Links: {{< bi github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/leifeld) · {{< bi globe >}} [Website](https://www.philipleifeld.com) · {{< bi mortarboard >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=DdzUmYsAAAAJ)

## Ongoing contributors

*(Previously employed or supervised or collaborating closely on lab-linked infrastructure or methods projects.)*

- **Shubhanjay Varma** --- Current PhD student *(since 2025)*, Department of Law, University of Manchester  
  Contributions to {{< bi box >}} [dna](https://github.com/leifeld-lab/dna); developing NLP and LLM workflows for statement annotation.  
  Link: {{< bi github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/Water1ock)

- **Laurence Brandenberger** --- Former PhD student *(2014-2019)* → now Senior Scientist, [University of Zurich  ](https://www.ipz.uzh.ch/en/people/employees/laureb.html)
  Contributions to {{< bi box >}} [dna](https://github.com/leifeld-lab/dna); author of the {{< bi box >}} [rem](https://github.com/brandenberger/rem) R package; ongoing methods collaborations.  
  Paper outputs: {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [JRSSA, forthcoming](https://doi.org/10.1093/jrsssa/qnag069) · {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [AJPS, forthcoming](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.1904.05327) · {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [PSJ 2022](https://doi.org/10.1111/psj.12404) · {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [BJPS 2019](https://doi.org/10.1017/S0007123417000217)  
  Links: {{< bi github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/brandenberger) · {{< bi globe >}} [Website](https://brandenbergerlaurence.com/) · {{< bi mortarboard >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=XErF7OYAAAAJ)

- **Tim Henrichsen** --- Former PhD student/postdoc *(2018-2024)* → now Research Fellow, [Univ. of Birmingham](https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/staff/profiles/gov/henrichsen-tim)  
  Contributions to {{< bi box >}} [dna](https://github.com/leifeld-lab/dna): IRT scaling; rDNA user interface; backbone detection.  
  Paper outputs: {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [backbone working paper](https://www.sg.ethz.ch/talks/2023_mmm/leifeld/Leifeld.pdf) · {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [R&P 2025](https://doi.org/10.1177/20531680241307940) · {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [JEPP 2022](https://doi.org/10.1080/13501763.2021.1945131) · {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [Addiction 2020](https://doi.org/10.1111/add.15068)  
  Links: {{< bi github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/TimHenrichsen) · {{< bi globe >}} [Website](https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/staff/profiles/gov/henrichsen-tim) · {{< bi mortarboard >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=0tMZQSoAAAAJ)

## Alumni & past contributors

*(Former members/affiliates/contributors.)*

- **Kristijan Garic** --- Former PhD student *(2023-2024)* → Survey Data Linkage Officer, [ISER, University of Essex](https://www.essex.ac.uk/people/GARIC44303/Kristijan-Garic)  
  Contributions to {{< bi box >}} [dna](https://github.com/leifeld-lab/dna): phase detection and frame evolution methods implementation in rDNA.  
  Paper outputs: {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [JCMS, forthcoming](https://doi.org/10.1111/jcms.70119) · {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [PSJ 2026](http://doi.org/10.1111/psj.70047) · {{< bi file-earmark-text >}} [ER&SS 2025](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.erss.2025.104020)  
  Links: {{< bi github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/Krgaric) · {{< bi globe >}} [Website](https://kristijangaric.com/) · {{< bi mortarboard >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Fd6PiyYAAAAJ)

- **Claudia Zucca** --- Former postdoc *(2018-2019)* → now Assistant Professor, [JADS](https://www.jads.nl/researcher/claudia-zucca/) & [Tilburg University](https://research.tilburguniversity.edu/en/persons/claudia-zucca/) & [TU/e](https://research.tue.nl/en/persons/claudia-zucca/)  
  Contributions to {{< bi box >}} [texreg](https://github.com/leifeld-lab/texreg): plotting functionality, praise function, and extraction methods.  
  Links: {{< bi github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/czucca) · {{< bi globe >}} [Website](https://www.jads.nl/researcher/claudia-zucca/) · {{< bi mortarboard >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_UVRM54AAAAJ)

- **Johannes Gruber** --- Former research assistant *(2017-2018)* → now Team Leader, [GESIS](https://www.gesis.org/en/institute/about-us/staff/person/Johannes.Gruber)  
  Contributions to {{< bi box >}} [dna](https://github.com/leifeld-lab/dna): rDNA UI; DNA documentation. Author of {{< bi box >}} [LexisNexisTools](https://github.com/JBGruber/LexisNexisTools) and other R packages.  
  Links: {{< bi github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/JBGruber) · {{< bi globe >}} [Website](https://www.johannesbgruber.eu) · {{< bi mortarboard >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=d6TudEgAAAAJ)

---

## How to be listed here

If you make visible contributions to the lab's infrastructure through sustained collaboration on lab software, datasets, and/or publications, you may be listed here. Please ask if you would like your entry updated, shortened, or removed.
